description: StraighterLine is an online education provider offering self-paced college courses designed to transfer for credit to partner colleges and universities. It helps students complete general education, prerequisite, and other undergraduate coursework at lower cost.
summary: StraighterLine exposes a public MCP server for its Degree Planner at `https://degreeplanner.straighterline.com/mcp`; no public developer HTTP APIs, GraphQL endpoints, or CLIs were found on `straighterline.com`.
